formats.apa: @HoustonOps. (2026). Irreversibility Threshold. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/antikythera-lexicon/api/v1/terms/irreversibility-threshold.json

jsonld.name: Irreversibility Threshold
jsonld.description: The heuristic for autonomous action: can this be undone in 10 minutes? Reversible actions proceed; irreversible actions wait for human approval.
